task.title: Fix broker PID filename mismatch and simplify ephemeral mode

events.content: TS CLI used hardcoded broker.pid but Rust writes broker-{name}.pid вҖ” root cause of stale lock errors: TS CLI used hardcoded broker.pid but Rust writes broker-{name}.pid вҖ” root cause of stale lock errors

raw.question: TS CLI used hardcoded broker.pid but Rust writes broker-{name}.pid вҖ” root cause of stale lock errors
raw.chosen: TS CLI used hardcoded broker.pid but Rust writes broker-{name}.pid вҖ” root cause of stale lock errors
raw.reasoning: Per-broker-name isolation PR changed Rust side but never updated TypeScript side

events.content: Removed ephemeral mode lock/PID entirely вҖ” SDK broker lifecycle tied to parent via stdin EOF: Removed ephemeral mode lock/PID entirely вҖ” SDK broker lifecycle tied to parent via stdin EOF

raw.question: Removed ephemeral mode lock/PID entirely вҖ” SDK broker lifecycle tied to parent via stdin EOF
raw.chosen: Removed ephemeral mode lock/PID entirely вҖ” SDK broker lifecycle tied to parent via stdin EOF
raw.reasoning: Lock was causing permission issues in /tmp across users and was unnecessary since parent exit triggers broker shutdown via EOF

raw.reasoning: ASCII-only regex would mismatch on non-ASCII directory names causing the same PID-not-found bug
